GetPlayerById(int playerId);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets a player by their username.\n        /// </summary>\n        Player? GetPlayerByUsername(string username);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets all characters for a specific player.\n        /// </summary>\n        IEnumerable<Character> GetCharactersByPlayerId(int playerId);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Gets a character by its ID.\n        /// </summary>\n        Character? GetCharacterById(int characterId);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Adds a new player.\n        /// </summary>\n        void AddPlayer(Player player);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Adds a character to a player's character list.\n        /// </summary>\n        void AddCharacter(int playerId, Character character);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Updates an existing player.\n        /// </summary>\n        void UpdatePlayer(Player player);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Deletes a player by ID.\n        /// </summary>\n        bool DeletePlayer(int playerId);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Deletes a character by ID.\n        /// </summary>\n        bool DeleteCharacter(int characterId);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01F9eLDEYD1qMoB4KQrxFRce__vscode-1776310418965","cwd":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt"}

      {\n                            CharacterId = 9,\n                            CharacterName = \"Michael Drake\",\n                            Race = RaceEnum.Tiefling,\n                            Background = BackgroundEnum.Sailor,\n                            Alignment = AlignmentEnum.ChaoticNeutral,\n                            Class = ClassEnum.Sorcerer,\n                            Level = new CharacterLevel { LevelId = 9, Level = 3, CurrentExperiencePoints = 900, ExperiencePointsToNextLevel = 2700, ProficiencyBonus = 2, DateOfLastLevelUp = DateTime.UtcNow.AddMonths(-4) },\n                            EquipmentList = new List<Equipment>\n                            {\n                                new Weapon { EquipmentId = 25, Type = \"Weapon\", Name = \"Dagger\", Cost = 2, Weight = 1, DamageAmount = \"1d4\", DamageType = \"Piercing\", WeaponProperties = new List<WeaponPropertiesEnum> { WeaponPropertiesEnum.Finesse, WeaponPropertiesEnum.Thrown } },\n                                new Armour { EquipmentId = 26, Type = \"Armour\", Name = \"Robes\", Cost = 1, Weight = 2, ArmourClass = 10, StrenghtRequierment = 0, StealthDisadvantage = false },\n                                new AdventuringGear { EquipmentId = 27, Type = \"Gear\", Name = \"Navigator's Tools\", Cost = 25, Weight = 2 }\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            };\n        }\n\n        public IEnumerable<Player> GetAllPlayers()\n        {\n            return _players.AsReadOnly();\n        }\n\n        public Player? GetPlayerById(int playerId)\n        {\n            return _players.FirstOrDefault(p => p.PlayerId == playerId);\n        }\n\n        public Player? GetPlayerByUsername(string username)\n        {\n            return _players.FirstOrDefault(p => p.Username.Equals(username, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));\n        }\n\n        public IEnumerable<Character> GetCharactersByPlayerId(int playerId)\n        {\n            var player = GetPlayerById(playerId);\n            return player?.CharacterList ?? new List<Character>();\n        }\n\n        public Character? GetCharacterById(int characterId)\n        {\n            return _players\n                .SelectMany(p => p.CharacterList)\n                .FirstOrDefault(c => c.CharacterId == characterId);\n        }\n\n        public void AddPlayer(Player player)\n        {\n            if (_players.Any(p => p.PlayerId == player.PlayerId))\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Player with ID {player.PlayerId} already exists.\");\n            }\n\n            _players.Add(player);\n        }\n\n        public void AddCharacter(int playerId, Character character)\n        {\n            var player = GetPlayerById(playerId);\n            if (player == null)\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Player with ID {playerId} not found.\");\n            }\n\n            if (player.CharacterList.Any(c => c.CharacterId == character.CharacterId))\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Character with ID {character.CharacterId} already exists for this player.\");\n            }\n\n            player.CharacterList.Add(character);\n        }\n\n        public void UpdatePlayer(Player player)\n        {\n            var existingPlayer = GetPlayerById(player.PlayerId);\n            if (existingPlayer == null)\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Player with ID {player.PlayerId} not found.\");\n            }\n\n            existingPlayer.Name = player.Name;\n            existingPlayer.Surname = player.Surname;\n            existingPlayer.Username = player.Username;\n            existingPlayer.Email = player.Email;\n            existingPlayer.Password = player.Password;\n            existingPlayer.LastLogin = player.LastLogin;\n        }\n\n        public bool DeletePlayer(int playerId)\n        {\n            var player = GetPlayerById(playerId);\n            if (player == null)\n            {\n                return false;\n            }\n\n            return _players.Remove(player);\n        }\n\n        public bool DeleteCharacter(int characterId)\n        {\n            foreach (var player in _players)\n            {\n                var character = player.CharacterList.FirstOrDefault(c => c.CharacterId == characterId);\n                if (character != null)\n                {\n                    return player.CharacterList.Remove(character);\n                }\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n}\n","filePath":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\Repositories\\MockPlayerRepository.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01AEfZnanQLVcWYv3Ypv1cvk__vscode-1776310418966","cwd":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt"}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-16T13:20:52.570Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"2c17a3b8-41be-4748-b8a1-7a74bfe953e9","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\David Laptop\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\67336a66a4a40a4161dc2c41d57a767b\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\2c17a3b8-41be-4748-b8a1-7a74bfe953e9.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\Repositories\\MockPlayerRepository.cs","content":"using DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator.Models;\n\nnamespace DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator.Repositories\n{\n    public class MockPlayerRepository : IPlayerRepository\n    {\n        private readonly List<Player> _players;\n\n        public MockPlayerRepository()\n        {\n            _players = MockRepositorySeed.CreatePlayers();\n        }\n\n        public IEnumerable<Player> GetAllPlayers()\n        {\n            return _players.AsReadOnly();\n        }\n\n        public Player? GetPlayerById(int playerId)\n        {\n            return _players.FirstOrDefault(player => player.PlayerId == playerId);\n        }\n\n        public Player? GetPlayerByUsername(string username)\n        {\n            return _players.FirstOrDefault(player => player.Username.Equals(username, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));\n        }\n\n        public void AddPlayer(Player player)\n        {\n            if (_players.Any(existingPlayer => existingPlayer.PlayerId == player.PlayerId))\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Player with ID {player.PlayerId} already exists.\");\n            }\n\n            player.CharacterList ??= new List<Character>();\n            _players.Add(player);\n        }\n\n        public void UpdatePlayer(Player player)\n        {\n            var existingPlayer = GetPlayerById(player.PlayerId);\n            if (existingPlayer == null)\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Player with ID {player.PlayerId} not found.\");\n            }\n\n            existingPlayer.Name = player.Name;\n            existingPlayer.Surname = player.Surname;\n            existingPlayer.Username = player.Username;\n            existingPlayer.Email = player.Email;\n            existingPlayer.Password = player.Password;\n            existingPlayer.LastLogin = player.LastLogin;\n            existingPlayer.CharacterList = player.CharacterList;\n        }\n\n        public bool DeletePlayer(int playerId)\n        {\n            var player = GetPlayerById(playerId);\n            if (player == null)\n            {\n                return false;\n            }\n\n            return _players.Remove(player);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_wa8uERd7yOrX22C0myj1cGaS__vscode-1776310418980","cwd":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt"}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-16T13:20:54.328Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"2c17a3b8-41be-4748-b8a1-7a74bfe953e9","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\David Laptop\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\67336a66a4a40a4161dc2c41d57a767b\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\2c17a3b8-41be-4748-b8a1-7a74bfe953e9.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\Repositories\\ICharacterRepository.cs","content":"using DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator.Models;\n\nnamespace DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator.Repositories\n{\n    public interface ICharacterRepository\n    {\n        IEnumerable<Character> GetAllCharacters();\n        IEnumerable<Character> GetCharactersByPlayerId(int playerId);\n        Character? {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T13:20:55.950Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"2c17a3b8-41be-4748-b8a1-7a74bfe953e9","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\David Laptop\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\67336a66a4a40a4161dc2c41d57a767b\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\2c17a3b8-41be-4748-b8a1-7a74bfe953e9.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator\\Repositories\\MockCharacterRepository.cs","content":"using DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator.Models;\n\nnamespace DnD_Character_Sheet_Creator.Repositories\n{\n    public class MockCharacterRepository : ICharacterRepository\n    {\n        private readonly Dictionary<int, List<Character>> _charactersByPlayerId;\n\n        public MockCharacterRepository()\n        {\n            _charactersByPlayerId = MockRepositorySeed.CreateCharactersByPlayerId();\n        }\n\n        public IEnumerable<Character> GetAllCharacters()\n        {\n            return _charactersByPlayerId.Values.SelectMany(characters => characters).ToList();\n        }\n\n        public IEnumerable<Character> GetCharactersByPlayerId(int playerId)\n        {\n            return _charactersByPlayerId.TryGetValue(playerId, out var characters)\n                ? characters.AsReadOnly()\n                : Enumerable.Empty<Character>();\n        }\n\n        public Character? GetCharacterById(int characterId)\n        {\n            foreach (var characterList in _charactersByPlayerId.Values)\n            {\n                var character = characterList.FirstOrDefault(existingCharacter => existingCharacter.CharacterId == characterId);\n                if (character != null)\n                {\n                    return character;\n                }\n            }\n\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        public void AddCharacter(int playerId, Character character)\n        {\n            if (!_charactersByPlayerId.TryGetValue(playerId, out var characters))\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Player with ID {playerId} not found.\");\n            }\n\n            if (GetCharacterById(character.CharacterId) != null)\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Character with ID {character.CharacterId} already exists.\");\n            }\n\n            characters.Add(character);\n        }\n\n        public void UpdateCharacter(Character character)\n        {\n            foreach (var characterList in _charactersByPlayerId.Values)\n            {\n                var existingCharacter = characterList.FirstOrDefault(item => item.CharacterId == character.CharacterId);\n                if (existingCharacter != null)\n                {\n                    existingCharacter.CharacterName = character.CharacterName;\n                    existingCharacter.Race = character.Race;\n                    existingCharacter.Background = character.Background;\n                    existingCharacter.Alignment = character.Alignment;\n                    existingCharacter.Class = character.Class;\n                    existingCharacter.Level = character.Level;\n                    existingCharacter.EquipmentList = character.EquipmentList;\n                    return;\n                }\n            }\n\n            throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Character with ID {character.CharacterId} not found.\");\n        }\n\n        public bool DeleteCharacter(int characterId)\n        {\n            foreach (var characterList in _charactersByPlayerId.Values)\n            {\n                var character = characterList.FirstOrDefault(existingCharacter => existingCharacter.CharacterId == characterId);\n                if (character != null)\n                {\n                    return characterList.Remove(character);\n                }\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_ZCPszjxs7Lj83lj2mfD2T63v__vscode-1776310418982","cwd":"c:\\TVZ\\Druga_apsolventska\\ASP_Net\\Projekt"}
